hero.body: [de] Pick a framework. Configure. Launch in 60 seconds. No code required, no infrastructure to manage. 4 frameworks, 20+ platforms, free tier with BYOK.

agentDiscovery.heading: [de] Command an army of subagents
agentDiscovery.body: [de] Your local coding agent becomes a fleet commander. Paste this prompt — it registers on Hatcher in your name, spins up always-on subagents (Telegram bots, research loops, Discord mods, monitors), and keeps controlling them long after your session ends.
agentDiscovery.step01: [de] Send this prompt to your AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes, or any agent that can fetch URLs and run shell commands.
agentDiscovery.step02: [de] Agent registers an account with your email and sends you a verification link.
agentDiscovery.step03: [de] Click verify. Your agent picks a template, deploys, and hands you a running AI.

howItWorks.heading: [de] 3 steps. 60 seconds.
howItWorks.subheading: [de] No coding, no setup guides, no configuration files.

steps.title: [de] Pick a framework
steps.desc: [de] OpenClaw, Hermes, ElizaOS, or Milady. Each has unique strengths — browser control, memory, multi-agent, on-chain.

steps.title: [de] Configure
steps.desc: [de] Name, personality, integrations. Fill a simple form — no config files, no YAML.

steps.title: [de] Deploy
steps.desc: [de] One click. Your agent is live on every connected platform in under 60 seconds.

useCases.heading: [de] What will you hatch?
useCases.subheading: [de] From personal productivity to business automation — your agent, your rules.

items.title: [de] Food & nutrition
items.desc: [de] Log meals, count calories, recipe suggestions.

items.title: [de] Crypto tracker
items.desc: [de] Token prices, portfolio alerts, on-chain data.

items.title: [de] Study buddy
items.desc: [de] Quiz you, summarize textbooks, help with homework.

items.title: [de] Travel planner
items.desc: [de] Find flights, plan itineraries, local picks.

items.title: [de] Budget manager
items.desc: [de] Track expenses, savings goals, weekly reports.

items.title: [de] Research assistant
items.desc: [de] Web search, summarize articles, compile reports.

items.title: [de] Customer support
items.desc: [de] Answer FAQs on Discord or WhatsApp, 24/7.

useCases.footer: [de] And anything else you can describe in plain English.

frameworks.heading: [de] Four frameworks. One platform.
frameworks.subheading: [de] Pick the one that fits your agent. Switch whenever you want.

items.name: OpenClaw
items.desc: [de] Powerful tools, plugins, and browser control.

items.name: Hermes
items.desc: [de] Smart-first design for rich memory and reasoning.

items.name: Milady
items.desc: [de] On-chain awareness, DeFi tools, token tracking.
items.features: [de] DeFi tools · On-chain data · Token tracking

city.heading: [de] See every agent in Hatcher City.
city.body: [de] A live 3D city where every public agent is a building. Districts by category, colors by framework, gold beams mark yours. Drag, zoom, click any building to open it.
city.label: HATCHER CITY

items.title: [de] Instant deploy
items.desc: [de] From zero to running agent in under 60 seconds.

items.title: [de] Bring your own key
items.desc: [de] Use your own LLM API key for unlimited messages on any tier.

items.title: [de] Secure by default
items.desc: [de] Isolated containers, encrypted secrets, no shared data.

items.title: [de] Live analytics
items.desc: [de] Real-time stats, usage tracking, performance metrics.

items.title: [de] Chat & voice
items.desc: [de] Text chat, voice calls, real-time streaming — out of the box.

pricing.heading: [de] Start free, grow when ready
pricing.subheading: [de] All platforms included on every plan. Bring your own AI key for unlimited messages on any tier.
pricing.addonsNote: [de] Need more agents, messages, or storage? Add stackable packs — all tiers get add-on flexibility.

founding.heading: [de] Pay once, keep forever.
founding.subheading: [de] Locked-in price, no monthly fees, all Business-tier features forever. Only 20 spots.
founding.allTaken: [de] All {max} founding spots are taken. Standard tiers still available.
founding.claimed: [de] {claimed} of {max} claimed · once they're gone, this offer is gone.

items.a: [de] Yes. The free plan gives you 1 agent, 20 messages per day, and access to all platforms. No credit card required. BYOK (bring your own LLM key) = unlimited messages on any tier.

items.q: [de] Do I need to know how to code?
items.a: [de] Not at all! Creating an agent is like filling out a form — choose a name, describe what you want it to do, pick platforms, and launch.
[de] Connect your own OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or Groq key for unlimited messages. You only pay your AI provider directly.
[de] On our cloud servers 24/7. No need to keep your computer on or install anything.

finalCta.heading: [de] Ready to deploy your first agent?
finalCta.body: [de] Free tier includes 1 agent with 20 messages/day. BYOK = unlimited. No credit card required.
